name: Ben Carson
subject: Peter, I need your feedback
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29522729:28302804851:m:1:876315805:145AD6168506F46A0577FD3FD4594B07:r)
---

Peter,

On Thursday night in Cleveland, I plan to participate in my first-ever presidential debate.

I'm blessed to be able to count you as a supporter, and as I prepare I would really like to get your feedback and suggestions.

[**Please go here now to answer 2 quick questions.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29522729:28302804851:m:1:876315805:145AD6168506F46A0577FD3FD4594B07:r)

Thank you for your participation, I look forward to hearing back from you.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29522730:28302804851:m:1:876315805:145AD6168506F46A0577FD3FD4594B07:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29522731:28302804851:m:1:876315805:145AD6168506F46A0577FD3FD4594B07:r)

Carson America, Inc | P.O. Box 26261 | Alexandria, VA 22313

name: Team Christie
subject: Host a Debate Party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
Peter,
Thursday evening is the first Republican Primary Debate on FOX News and I just wanted to make sure you had the details to hold your very own debate watch party.

****
****
****
**Details:**
FOX News Debate
9:00PM ET

If you get 5 friends to sign up for your debate watch party, you will unlock a free downloadable party kit. The kit includes party decorations that will rival your best Pinterest planner, games to keep the party going, and more! **[Send this link to your friends and have them sign up](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43257550:18459795013:m:1:1516426255:5006ED8AAF69A345B4142E0D33858BD4:r)** \--make sure they note you as host! Once you have 5 friends attending, we will send you the link to download the kit.
Post your pictures! Tag Governor Christie on social media by posting your picture with the hashtag #ChristieDebates and you may get a special acknowledgement from the Governor himself!
Thanks,

Team Christie

|

name: John McCain
subject: Stand with Lindsey
body:
LindseyGraham.com

Friend,

Running for President comes with both the good and bad - I should
know. It's a remarkable opportunity to travel our great nation
and meet Americans in every corner of every state, but it also
opens you and your family up to vicious attacks.

Right now, Senator Lindsey Graham is facing just that. Earlier
this week, The Washington Post launched a misleading, outrageous
attack on Senator Graham's service in the U.S. Air Force. And
today, The New York Times ran an equally outrageous editorial
demeaning his military career.

In response, several military leaders who Senator Graham served
with and under in Iraq and Afghanistan, including General David
Petraeus, issued statements applauding Lindsey's service and
refuting the attacks.

Apparently these liberal Obama supporters have nothing else to do
but unfairly dissect and denigrate Senator Graham's distinguished
service to our country.

In the face of these liberal attacks, Lindsey needs to know that
you're with him right now.

Please join me and stand with Lindsey Graham and support his
campaign for President.

Our nation is at a crossroads. The leader we elect in 2016 will
determine the path our nation takes. Lindsey Graham is the
proven, experienced leader our nation so desperately needs. We
cannot allow these liberal blowhards to distort his record or
slander his service any more.

If you want to reverse the wrongs done by President Obama and get
our country back on a path of prosperity and security, then join
me in supporting Lindsey Graham.

Thanks for your continued support.

Sincerely,

John McCain

P.S. Lindsey needs to know he can continue to count on us. Please
show him he can by making an instant online contribution to his
campaign right now. Thank you.

Paid for by Lindsey
Graham 2016

Use of Senator Graham's military rank, job titles, and
photographs in uniform does notimply endorsement by the
Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 14, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWHl19AmpN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWHl19AmpN

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: Bracing for the worst
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

The first of nine scheduled Republican presidential debates is set to kick off Thursday, August 6th in Cleveland.

With the field set, I know one thing is certain...

For daring to stand up to the Big Government status-quo in Washington, D.C., I know there are plenty of members in both the media and my own Republican Party who would love to diminish my campaign.

But for the life of me, I don't see how they can.

Not with polls showing me leading Hillary Clinton in key swing states like Colorado, Iowa, Pennsylvania, Ohio, and New Hampshire.

But with all the funny business my campaign has already seen, I'm not taking anything for granted!

**[That's why I'm counting on you to please click here to sign your Republican Debate Mandate IMMEDIATELY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29527586:28312247438:m:1:879035888:80FB9B678B8914B145518BE1B046D178:r)**.

And if possible, **[please chip in $20.16](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29527586:28312247438:m:1:879035888:80FB9B678B8914B145518BE1B046D178:r)** as well to help my campaign show a surge of recent contributors ahead of the first presidential debate.

With time running out before the debate starts, I can't begin to explain just how important your support is today.

A strong performance can catapult a serious candidate to the very top of the primary polls.

But a bad answer to a left-wing moderator's "gotcha question" can crush a leading candidate's campaign overnight.

And with no clear Republican primary frontrunner, the stakes are higher right now than ever before.

The good news is, the American people are flocking to my campaign in support of my strong stands to:

*** CUT TAXES AND SPENDING. We need to blow up our current complicated and confusing tax code and start over. My Fair and Flat Tax would eliminate the payroll tax -- the biggest tax most Americans pay -- return $2 TRILLION to the American people over ten years, grow our GDP by a whopping 10% and result in at least 1.4 million new jobs;

*** PASS TERM LIMITS to end the reign of career politicians in Washington, D.C.;

*** FORCE MEMBERS OF CONGRESS TO ACTUALLY READ THE BILLS THEY VOTE ON, and stop their habit of ramming thousand-page bills into law at the last minute before anyone knows what's being voted on;

*** REPEAL ALL OF OBAMACARE to stop the soaring health insurance premium costs, policy cancellations, shuttered hospitals and poorer quality healthcare that have all resulted from this outrageous federal takeover;

*** AUDIT THE FEDERAL RESERVE to end the "print-now, ask-questions-later" policies that result in boom-bust economic cycles like the recent housing and financial crises;

*** PROTECT THE ENTIRE BILL OF RIGHTS. That means protecting our religious liberties, political speech, gun rights and our Fourth Amendment right to privacy from government spying.

But I'm afraid my challenge to the Big Government "consensus" in Washington, D.C. has made me a top target for Big Government members of BOTH parties -- and our national media.

I know media types like to masquerade as "objective."

But let's not kid ourselves.

For months now, media "experts" have spouted predictions that November 2016 will be a showdown between two candidates with yesterday's last names pushing yesterday's failed Big Government policies.

And then we learned that one news anchor - a past debate moderator and former Clintonista - was caught contributing $75,000 to Hillary Clinton's Foundation!

Knowing how strong my poll numbers are against Hillary Clinton, is it any wonder both the press and their Democrat allies have tried to attack me with everything they have?

They know I'm the biggest threat to the Big Government status-quo today.

They know the American people are ready to finally DEFEAT the Washington Machine.

And they know that the debates mark the first time many Americans begin to "tune in" to the presidential race.

That's why I'm bracing for the worst.

In the past, you and I have seen moderators attempt to skew debate outcomes by making themselves the story -- or doling out time and softball questions to candidates who most agree with their Big Government beliefs.

Is more of this madness in store?

I believe your action today can help decide that.

The more recent contributors my campaign can boast -- to go along with our strong poll numbers -- the harder it will be for our national media to engage in any more "funny business" \-- or launch any more attacks and smears against me.

Not only that, but your generosity will help my campaign ramp up our grassroots efforts in the key early states of Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina and Nevada.

With your support, my campaign will be able to pay for everything from bumper stickers and palm cards, to pizza for volunteers, to campaign mail, email, social media, and even Internet and TV ads!

All of this, combined with strong debate performances and a feverish campaign stop schedule are what I believe it will take to WIN.

Fellow Conservative, with your help, that's exactly what I intend to do.

But I can't defeat the Washington Machine without you.

**[So please sign your Republican Debate Mandate IMMEDIATELY to let me know you're standing with me during this most critical time](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29527586:28312247438:m:1:879035888:80FB9B678B8914B145518BE1B046D178:r)**.

And if possible, **[please chip in $20.16](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29527586:28312247438:m:1:879035888:80FB9B678B8914B145518BE1B046D178:r)** right away.

I know that's a lot.

But I have a lot of work to do. And with the first debate right around the corner on August 6th, I MUST show a surge of recent contributors as soon as possible!

If $20.16 is just too much, **[please chip in at least $10](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29527586:28312247438:m:1:879035888:80FB9B678B8914B145518BE1B046D178:r)**.

I know I'm going to be walking into a lion's den when these Republican presidential debates kick off.

I'm counting on you to please stand with me.

**[Please click here to sign your Republican Debate Mandate, and chip in $20.16 IMMEDIATELY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29527586:28312247438:m:1:879035888:80FB9B678B8914B145518BE1B046D178:r)**!

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29527587:28312247438:m:1:879035888:80FB9B678B8914B145518BE1B046D178:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29527588:28312247438:m:1:879035888:80FB9B678B8914B145518BE1B046D178:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29527589:28312247438:m:1:879035888:80FB9B678B8914B145518BE1B046D178:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29527590:28312247438:m:1:879035888:80FB9B678B8914B145518BE1B046D178:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29527586:28312247438:m:1:879035888:80FB9B678B8914B145518BE1B046D178:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

P.S. With no clear Republican primary frontrunner, the upcoming presidential debates are going to be absolutely critical.

For daring to stand up to the Big Government status-quo in Washington, D.C., I know there are members of the media and my own Republican Party who would love to keep me out.

That's why I need to show a surge of new contributors to ensure my position is as strong as possible.

**[Please click here to sign your Republican Debate Mandate -- and chip in $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29527586:28312247438:m:1:879035888:80FB9B678B8914B145518BE1B046D178:r)!

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29527586:28312247438:m:1:879035888:80FB9B678B8914B145518BE1B046D178:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29527591:28312247438:m:1:879035888:80FB9B678B8914B145518BE1B046D178:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29527592:28312247438:m:1:879035888:80FB9B678B8914B145518BE1B046D178:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29527593:28312247438:m:1:879035888:80FB9B678B8914B145518BE1B046D178:r)**
**
Paid for by Rand Paul for President
**

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/is642tAmsN). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os642tAmsN)

name: John Weaver
subject: Breaking News: Debate Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[

](www.JohnKasich.com)
Peter, we're pleased to share with you that **Fox News just announced that Gov. John Kasich has been invited to attend the primetime Presidential debate** this Thursday evening in Cleveland. [Can you chip in right now to help us continue our momentum?](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29532271:28312693029:m:1:958431888:65630158FE3E553F4830113DBD9E2B7C:r)

**Since entering the race two weeks ago, we've seen a tremendous amount of support** and the momentum not only carried us into this debate, but with your help, it will continue so we can win this primary and go on to defeat Hillary.

**Here are several things you can do right now to help:**

**1.** **Help us**[**raise the funds**](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29532271:28312693029:m:1:958431888:65630158FE3E553F4830113DBD9E2B7C:r)**to build up our grassroots programs**. [Chip in $25, $50, $100 or more right now](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29532271:28312693029:m:1:958431888:65630158FE3E553F4830113DBD9E2B7C:r).

**2.** **[Sign up to volunteer](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29532272:28312693029:m:1:958431888:65630158FE3E553F4830113DBD9E2B7C:r) and share this email with your friends** around the country to ask them to do the same.

**3.** **Post on social media right now about why you support Gov. Kasich**. Be sure to include @JohnKasich and use the hashtag #Kasich4Us

Peter, I've worked on a number of presidential campaigns before and believe me, this is the right candidate at the right time.

_**America NEEDS John Kasich**_. Let's win.

Sincerely,

**
John Weaver**
Chief Strategist

[

](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29532273:28312693029:m:1:958431888:65630158FE3E553F4830113DBD9E2B7C:r)

clean_body: www.JohnKasich.com Peter, we're pleased to share with you that Fox News just announced that Gov. John Kasich has been invited to attend the primetime Presidential debate this Thursday evening in Cleveland. Since entering the race two weeks ago, we've seen a tremendous amount of support and the momentum not only carried us into this debate, but with your help, it will continue so we can win this primary and go on to defeat Hillary. Here are several things you can do right now to help: 1. Help us build up our grassroots programs. . 2. and share this email with your friends around the country to ask them to do the same. 3. Post on social media right now about why you support Gov. Kasich. Be sure to include @JohnKasich and use the hashtag #Kasich4Us Peter, I've worked on a number of presidential campaigns before and believe me, this is the right candidate at the right time. America NEEDS John Kasich. Let's win. Sincerely, John Weaver Chief Strategist Paid for by Kasich For America, www.JohnKasich.com This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system July 18, 2015. name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Wish POTUS a Happy Birthday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend,

Today is President Obama's birthday!

President Obama has fought tirelessly for middle-class families, guaranteed healthcare as a right, led our country through an economic crisis, brought down our nation's unemployment rate, and worked tirelessly to advance the civil rights of all Americans.

I have been honored to work shoulder to shoulder with the president to advance many of our top priorities, and I salute him for all he has done for our country.

[_**I hope you 'll join me in wishing him a very happy birthday!**_](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e9f/70cdc2ba/479d3fb9/3950acc/1433552918/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/wish-president-obama-a-happy-birthday-") [_****_](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e9f/70cdc2ba/479d3fb9/3950acc/1433552918/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/wish-president-obama-a-happy-birthday-") Thanks,

Chris

| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e9f/70cdc2ba/479d3fb9/3950acd/1433552918/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Vincent Balascio
subject: Last night's presidential forum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pataki for President, Inc
body:
-
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/dea47ee805/ace65cf3c9/11f3fad57b/sc=728eb

Friend,

I hope you got to watch Governor Pataki at the Voters First
Presidential Forum in New Hampshire. Once again, Governor Pataki
showed that he is the only candidate with the vision, message, and
experience to beat Hillary Clinton and get this country back on
track.

Please take a few minutes to watch this clip -
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/dea47ee805/ace65cf3c9/a5b9c1e70c/v=KQeLpPeYFZk from the forum. It was a powerful moment in which Governor Pataki
described his experience leading New York through the attacks of
September 11th and how it changed his life forever.

For Governor Pataki, radical Islamic terrorism isn't some abstract
issue. It's one that he confronted firsthand as Governor of New York,
and it is why he's uniquely prepared and committed to defeat ISIS as
president.

If you believe, like I do, that we need Governor Pataki's leadership
in the White House, please contribute $5, $10, $50, $100, $500,
$1,000, or even $2,700 -
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/dea47ee805/ace65cf3c9/88af461de4/sc=804eb today.

We can only continue our strong momentum with your support, and we
need it now more than ever.
Thank you,

Vincent Balascio

Campaign Manager
Pataki for President

-
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/dea47ee805/ace65cf3c9/9682362746/sc=804eb

Paid for by Pataki for President, Inc.

www.GeorgePataki.com -

name: Rick Santorum
subject: Stop the Madness!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
body:
| [ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=senate_fail_pp&n=1)
---
Friend --
Yesterday, Senate Republicans failed us. More importantly, they failed the innocent little children being butchered by Planned Parenthood! When I was a Senator, we banned partial birth abortions... now Republicans in the Senate can't even punish an organization that is doing what I outlawed a decade ago! I'm sick over it! [I need your help to stop this madness!](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/defund_planned_parenthood?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=senate_fail_pp&n=2) Will you support our campaign with a contribution of just $25 so we can put a pro-life leader in the White House? The most powerful tool of the presidency is the bully pulpit, and you know I will use it to fight for the dignity of each and every human life. I was able to ban partial birth abortions and I will stop Planned Parenthood in their tracks! Together, we can fight for life.

[DONATE TODAY!](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/defund_planned_parenthood?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=senate_fail_pp&n=3) Join the fight! Rick Santorum for President
[http://www.ricksantorum.com/](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=senate_fail_pp&n=4)

[ ](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/contribute?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=senate_fail_pp&n=5)

Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/unsubscribe?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=senate_fail_pp&n=6).
You can also keep up with Rick Santorum for President on [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FRickSantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=senate_fail_pp&n=7) or [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FRickSantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=senate_fail_pp&n=8).

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Jeb Bush and women's health care
body:
#
Friend,
If you can believe it, Jeb Bush said this today:
_"I'm not sure we need half a billion dollars for women's health issues."_
Let me tell you what I believe: we need to be spending a lot _**more**_ money on women's health care. We need to be investing in organizations like Planned Parenthood that provide absolutely essential health services for women, particularly in low-income communities.
And Americans need a president who knows women in this nation deserve a whole lot more than $3 a person for health care.
[**We must stand up for women's health. Add your name to fight these Republican attacks on women's health care.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2329/43f17890/5d6afd35/621d4795/2318996348/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/stand-up-for-womens-health-care?source=em150804")
Jeb Bush saying that a half billion dollars for women's health care is too much shows just how low the Republican candidates will sink to cater to the radical fringe in this election. I am eager to show the country why they are wrong, and **[I hope you'll join me in standing up for women's health care.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2329/43f17890/5d6afd35/621d4795/2318996348/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/stand-up-for-womens-health-care?source=em150804")**
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2329/43f17890/5d6afd35/621d4792/2318996348/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=emb150804")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2329/43f17890/5d6afd35/621d4793/2318996348/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2329/43f17890/5d6afd35/621d4790/2318996348/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2329/43f17890/5d6afd35/621d4791/2318996348/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2329/43f17890/5d6afd35/621d479e/2318996348/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
